description_cn:
根据顶点是否被面包围，将网格的顶点排序成两个列表。

根据点在网格的内部和边缘的关系，将点分成两组输出。
description_en:
Sorts the vertices of a mesh into 2 lists according to whether or not they are surrounded by faces。

Based on the relationship between the points inside and at the edges of the mesh, the points are divided into two groups for output.

outputs.name: ClothedI
outputs.desc_en: Indexes of vertices surrounded by faces

outputs.name: NakedI
outputs.cn: 没有被面包围顶点的索引
outputs.desc_cn: 没有被面包围顶点的索引
outputs.desc_en: Indexes of vertices not surrounded by faces

outputs.name: ClothedPts
outputs.cn: 被面包围顶点的点（位置）
outputs.desc_cn: 被面包围顶点的点（位置）
outputs.desc_en: Point locations of vertices surrounded by faces

outputs.name: NakedPts
outputs.cn: 顶点的点（位置）不被面包围
outputs.desc_cn: 顶点的点（位置）不被面包围
outputs.desc_en: Point locations of vertices not surrounded by faces

author: Kangaroo Team
